ComponentsCard

Card

Content container with optional image, title, description, body, and footer slots.

Design Language Comparison

Neobrutalism

Card Title

A short description for this card.

Shadcn-inspired

Card Title

A short description for this card.

Flowbite-inspired

Card Title

A short description for this card.

Neobrutalism

Hard offset shadow, thick border, no border-radius.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Neobrutalism Card</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="neobrutalism.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding:32px;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:320px;">
  <div class="nb-card">
    <div class="nb-card__body">
      <h3 class="nb-card__title">Card Title</h3>
      <p class="nb-card__description">A brief description of the card content goes here.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-card__content">
      <p>Additional content can go here.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-card__footer">
      <button style="padding:4px 12px;font-weight:800;border:2px solid #000;cursor:pointer;background:#fff;">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>

Shadcn-inspired

Soft shadow, 8 px radius, neutral surface.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Shadcn Card</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="shadcn.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding:32px;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:320px;">
  <div class="shadcn-card">
    <div class="shadcn-card__body">
      <h3 class="shadcn-card__title">Card Title</h3>
      <p class="shadcn-card__description">A brief description of the card content goes here.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="shadcn-card__content"><p>Additional content.</p></div>
    <div class="shadcn-card__footer">
      <button style="padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;cursor:pointer;background:#18181b;color:#fafafa;font-size:0.875rem">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>

Flowbite-inspired

Minimal border, 8 px radius, hover shadow lift.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Flowbite Card</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="flowbite.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding:32px;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:320px;">
  <div class="fb-card">
    <div class="fb-card__body">
      <h3 class="fb-card__title">Card Title</h3>
      <p class="fb-card__description">A brief description of the card content goes here.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="fb-card__content"><p>Additional content.</p></div>
    <div class="fb-card__footer">
      <button style="padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;background:#1c64f2;color:#fff;font-size:0.875rem">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
Last updated on April 26, 2026
